block_01: All traders, no matter how good, make mistakes, and there is nothing wrong with this as long as you learn from them. However, most mistakes that novice traders make can be easily avoided. A trading plan can be a good example. Most novice traders don’t have one — which is a grave mistake in itself.
block_02: What other mistakes do you make? Learn how to identify and avoid them by reading the article.
block_04: 5 Day Trading Tips to Apply Today
block_05: Let’s be honest, day trading is really complicated. Traders have to know a lot and possess certain skills. Here is a collection of 5 tips that can be of great help to any novice trader. Read and watch your trades improve.
block_08: Stochastic is one of the, if not the, most popular technical analysis tools out there — and for a good reason. For an indicator that simple it provides a lot of utility. Learn how to use it in trading.
